data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for local policy controls without hardcoded global rules.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of local policy controls that do not enforce hardcoded global rules. However, the prior steps do not provide any evidence related to local policy controls or their implementation. As a result, the evidence is insufficient to confirm or deny the requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of local policy controls without hardcoded global rules.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
